Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(t1_0.amount), 0) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.transaction_type_id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.transaction_date, t1_0.transaction_type_id, t1_0.user_id from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and ( ? is null or lower(t1_0.description) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.category_id=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_type_id=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_date>=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_date<=? ) order by t1_0.transaction_date desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.name, c1_0.transaction_type_id, tt1_0.id, tt1_0.name, c1_0.user_id from categories c1_0 join transaction_types tt1_0 on tt1_0.id=c1_0.transaction_type_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.description, t1_0.transaction_date, t1_0.transaction_type_id, t1_0.user_id from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and ( ? is null or lower(t1_0.description) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.category_id=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_type_id=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_date>=? ) and ( ? is null or t1_0.transaction_date<=? ) order by t1_0.transaction_date desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.name, c1_0.transaction_type_id, tt1_0.id, tt1_0.name, c1_0.user_id from categories c1_0 join transaction_types tt1_0 on tt1_0.id=c1_0.transaction_type_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.name, c1_0.transaction_type_id, tt1_0.id, tt1_0.name, c1_0.user_id from categories c1_0 join transaction_types tt1_0 on tt1_0.id=c1_0.transaction_type_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.password_hash, u1_0.username from users u1_0 where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select t1_0.category_id, c1_0.name, tt1_0.name, sum(t1_0.amount) from transactions t1_0 join categories c1_0 on c1_0.id=t1_0.category_id join transaction_types tt1_0 on tt1_0.id=t1_0.transaction_type_id where t1_0.user_id=? group by t1_0.category_id, c1_0.name, tt1_0.name
